programs.title: Flip Side
programs.desc: Friends Erikka and Cherethia take on married duo Christina and Steve.

programs.title: Chain Reaction
programs.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programs.title: America Says
programs.sub_title: High School Squad vs. The School Counselors
programs.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programs.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programs.title: The Chase
programs.sub_title: Gotta Risk It to Get the Brisket
programs.desc: Brandon "The Lightning Bolt" Blackwell, returns as the featured Chaser as he faces off in a trivia battle against a personal stylist, a software consultant, an executive coach and a diversity and inclusion leader.

programs.title: The Wall
programs.desc: Goldin, a fitness guru who started a nonprofit to encourage kids to exercise and read, and fiancée Linda, currently a college professor soon to earn her doctorate, take on the wall.
